question: In which Virginia county is the NASA facility of a system developed? Operationally, it manages a Temporary Assistance caseload of 4,000 to 6,000 using a staff of 600 to 1,000, while processing between 200 and 400 new case openings per month. What year was its county seat incorporated as a city? Please return the year only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
